macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Oil Prices Drop Below $100 After US-Iran Ceasefire Deal
items.summary: Oil prices plunged more than 15% from $115 to around $94 per barrel following a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran. Stocks surged in response to the de-escalation in Middle East tensions.

items.title: Broad Equity Prices Fall 5% Amid AI Concerns and Software Sector Weakness
items.summary: US equity markets declined about 5% over the recent intermeeting period, with the software sector underperforming due to AI-related concerns impacting stocks and leveraged loans. Private credit funds saw increased redemption requests.

items.title: Fed Staff Highlights Elevated Inflation Risks and Downside Growth Concerns
items.summary: Fed staff noted solid GDP growth but low job gains, persistently elevated consumer price inflation above 2% since 2021, and risks tilted to downside for employment/GDP and upside for inflation due to Middle East tensions and AI adoption.

items.title: Key US Economic Data Releases Scheduled for Today
items.summary: Upcoming releases include ADP Employment Change at 63K (prior 40K), Retail Sales MoM at -0.2%, ISM Manufacturing PMI at 52.4, Initial Jobless Claims at 230K, and Fed Chair Powell Speech at 2:30 PM UTC.

items.title: Ground Beef Prices Surge on Tight US Cattle Supply
items.summary: Ground beef prices are rising due to historically tight US cattle herds from drought and high feed costs, constrained slaughter, and resilient consumer demand amid elevated input costs.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Brutal Price Crash for Altcoins After Binance Delisting
items.summary: BIFI crashed 32% in the past 24 hours following Binance delisting, while other affected altcoins dropped 20-25%. This highlights immediate market reaction to exchange actions.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Hit $195 Million Amid Volatility
items.summary: Global crypto markets saw $195 million in futures liquidations over the past 24 hours, with Bitcoin facing short squeezes and Ethereum/altcoins seeing long liquidations. This indicates intense pressure on leveraged traders.

items.title: Cango Sells 2,000 Bitcoin to Reduce Loans Amid Market Plunge
items.summary: Bitcoin mining firm Cango sold 2,000 BTC in March to cut Bitcoin-backed loans, strengthening its balance sheet after a 50% BTC crash from ATH. Production costs dropped 19.3% to $68,215 per coin.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Drops 1.65% to $2.41 Trillion as Bitcoin Struggles at $71K
items.summary: Overall crypto market cap fell 1.65% in 24 hours; BTC retreated to $71K after failing $73K resistance, ETH at $2.18K. Underperformers include Algorand (-11.4%), Aptos/Polkadot (-6.1%).

items.title: US SEC Labels Past Crypto Prosecutions as Misguided
items.summary: The SEC described its previous enforcement against 95 crypto firms under Gary Gensler as misguided. This signals potential regulatory shift.

items.title: Split Capital Hedge Fund Shuts Down Citing Declining Crypto Projects
items.summary: Zahir Abtikar closed Split Capital, arguing the crypto hedge fund model is ineffective due to fewer high-quality projects and rampant imitation.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: EMQX Enterprise 6.2 Introduces Native Agent Discovery and Governance for AI and IoT Systems
items.summary: EMQX has released Enterprise 6.2, featuring native agent discovery and governance capabilities tailored for AI and IoT systems. This update enhances management and scalability in AI-driven IoT environments.

items.title: Gen Z AI Adoption Steady at 51% Weekly Use, but Skepticism and Negative Emotions Rise
items.summary: A Gallup survey from February-March 2026 shows 51% of U.S. Gen Zers use generative AI weekly, but excitement dropped to 22%, hopefulness to 18%, and anger rose to 31%. Gen Z students anticipate needing AI skills for future education and jobs.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: PlayStation State of Play Rumored for April 16
items.summary: Insider Nate the Hate has shared an unconfirmed date of April 16th for the next PlayStation State of Play event, which is expected to be third-party focused with potential reveals including Assassin's Creed 4 Black Flag Remake.

items.title: Crimson Desert Reaches 4 Million Sales in 12 Days
items.summary: Pearl Abyss's Crimson Desert has sold 4 million copies and achieved a Metacritic score of 77, receiving significantly higher critical acclaim than initially anticipated since its launch.

items.title: Fortnite x Toy Story Collaboration Launches Friday
items.summary: Fortnite's collaboration with Toy Story drops on Friday, featuring Buzz Lightyear and Zurg skins along with additional cosmetics including back blings, pickaxes, emotes, and a glider.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Prologue Gameplay Released
items.summary: New prologue gameplay footage for Forza Horizon 6 has been released, with the full game coming to PlayStation 5 later in 2026.

items.title: Call of Duty Warzone Season 3 Meta Update
items.summary: Warzone's new meta has been updated post-Season 3 with the addition of three new weapons, affecting the current competitive landscape.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
